title: Cinematic Storyboard Sheet
sourceTitle: Using All These Images I Would Like

imagePrompts.prompt:
Using all of these images, I would like you to create a key frame storyboard sheet of Sauce feeding Slatt Smalls cat food. The scene should start as Sauce:

• walking to the Kitchen to grab Smalls box
• placing it on the floor next to Slatt
• Slatt rubs his body on the box
• Sauce opens the box
• pulls out one of the Smalls cat food pates that you have an image of
• dropping it into that food bowl on the ground for Slatt to eat
•then end with our end card logo
